title: Rainbow Diamond Ores & Ancient Debris
description: Adds a rainbow outline around diamond ores and ancient debris, making these blocks stand out.
body:
## Rainbow Diamond Ores & Ancient Debris
This pack adds a glowing rainbow outline around diamond ores and ancient debris, making it easy to see in the nether and/or in the dark.

![Gif of diamond ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb1c47c8f79938fc5f3bb0fbae8cdedfcadc4076.gif)
![Gif of deepslate diamond ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/518c56a551b3e6bef62b2896ee0243ac7bc52d02.gif)
![Gif of ancient debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f80086209e6a68bd4318dde6ac6c0e0f6647167.gif)

**If the emissive textures cause [z-fighting](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Z-fighting) please update to [Sodium 0.6+](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)**

## **‼️‼️THE OUTLINE WONT BE LIT UP WITHOUT [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) MOD.**‼️‼️

**I know that vanilla 1.21.2+ supports emissive textures but these ones are impossible to make, because vanilla doesnt support having face specific glowing textures**

![Comparing the blocks without mods and with mods showing that they lit up with mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fc76a23f3f5f95b68a4174a73717df3052878fd.png)
